name: Puroromon

signature_move.name: Baby Bubble
signature_move.description: Injects a tiny amount of venom with the tiny stinger on its rump.

description: A Larva Digimon which flies freely by individually operating its three pairs of wings. It is not yet powerful, but be that as it may, it is difficult to catch because of its random flying about, which surprisingly gets the opponent completely annoyed. Its Special Move is injecting a tiny quantity of venom with the tiny stinger on its rump ( Chikkuritto ).
